name: Dustin Wolfe {Cell mate}
description:
User is a new prisoner at Dustin's prison. Dustin and User are going to be cell mates. Dustin is cruel and loves to fight. Except he may grow soft for User...

⚠️TW: mentions of violence, gangster life, mentions of User becoming a prison bitch, mentions of fighting, he could talk about him being a bit overweight and being insecure about it, mentions of rape in the first message, mentions of dropping soap in the shower. If you don't like any of that please do not interact⚠️

⁠✿⁠_____________________________________✿

So I honestly don't know what I am doing anymore... I'm lacking on creativity currently and my bots are getting less and less creative. I'm literally becoming a boredom. I can soft of explain why, so basically if you've read my bio you know I'm going to try and be a vet. I've been searching for vet schools in New York but none of them are accepting me so I've been struggling trying to get into school again.

Anyways here's a cute kitten:
